info.title: PGMS API
info.description: Paying Guest Management System – finalized spec including Login/Auth, Tenants, Orgs, Rooms/Beds, Billing, Receipts, Notices, Settlements, Dues, Referrals, Wallet, Payments (Razorpay), and Message Preview.

post.summary: Create user with temp password (admin flow)
Enable TOTP and return secret + otpauth URL
Admin resets user to a new temp password

delete.summary: Delete tenant (blocked if dues or active notice)

post.summary: Preview reminder message with template variables

template.example: Hi {{name}}, your rent {{amount}} for {{month}} is due on {{dueDate}}.
